svg.title: state diagram
svg.desc: A state diagram with 9 nodes and 10 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: __state_start, Parsed, StructurallyValidated.. Key relationships: __state_start points to Parsed; Parsed points to StructurallyValidated; StructurallyValidated points to ContractsValidated.. Layout spans 792 by 1200 units with 9 rendered node boxes and 10 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
